documentation:
## Aliyun ROS ACM Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as ACM from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-acm';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.datasource.Configurations.attr_configurations
documentation: Attribute Configurations: The list of configurations.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.datasource.Configurations.attr_data_ids
documentation: Attribute DataIds: The list of configuration data IDs.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::ACM::Configurations`, which is used to query the information about configurations.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosConfigurations\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-acm-configurations>

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.datasource.ConfigurationsProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Configurations`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-acm-configurations>

```
param namespace_id

Property namespaceId: The namespace ID of configuration.

param app_name

Property appName: The app name of configuration.

param data_id

Property dataId: The data ID of configuration.

param group

Property group: The group of configuration.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.datasource.ConfigurationsProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

modules.name: ros_cdk_acm
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS ACM Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as ACM from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-acm';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_acm.Configuration

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.Configuration.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.Configuration.attr_data_id
documentation: Attribute DataId: The ID of the configuration.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ACM::Configuration`, which is used to create a configuration.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosConfiguration\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-acm-configuration>

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.ConfigurationProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Configuration`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-acm-configuration>

```
param content

Property content: The contents of the configuration.

param data_id

Property dataId: The ID of the configuration. Allowed characters are upper and lower case letters, numbers, decimal points (.), Colons (:), asterisks (*), underscores (_), and underscores (-). When the ID prefix is the following value, ACM will automatically use KMS service to encrypt this configuration: The prefix is cipher-: the KMS service is called to encrypt and decrypt the configuration. The size of the encrypted data does not exceed 4 KB, and the maximum does not exceed 6 KB. Special symbols such as and (&) will decrypt errors and are not recommended. The prefix is cipher-kms-aes-128-: using KMS's envelope encryption and decryption method, the configuration content can exceed 6 KB, up to 100 KB. The plain text data of the configuration content will not be transmitted to the KMS system, which is more secure and recommended.

param namespace_id

Property namespaceId: ID of namespace.

param app_name

Property appName: Configuration application name.

param desc

Property desc: Configuration description explains.

param group

Property group: Group.

param tags

Property tags: Label configurations, such as the presence of a plurality of tags, separated by commas.

param type

Property type: Provisioning content format, optional values as follows: text, json, xml, yaml, text/html, properties.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.ConfigurationProps.content
documentation: Property content: The contents of the configuration.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.ConfigurationProps.data_id
documentation:
Property dataId: The ID of the configuration.

Allowed characters are upper and lower case letters, numbers, decimal points (.), Colons (:), asterisks (*), underscores (_), and underscores (-). When the ID prefix is the following value, ACM will automatically use KMS service to encrypt this configuration:
The prefix is cipher-: the KMS service is called to encrypt and decrypt the configuration. The size of the encrypted data does not exceed 4 KB, and the maximum does not exceed 6 KB. Special symbols such as and (&) will decrypt errors and are not recommended.
The prefix is cipher-kms-aes-128-: using KMS's envelope encryption and decryption method, the configuration content can exceed  6 KB, up to 100 KB. The plain text data of the configuration content will not be transmitted to the KMS system, which is more secure and recommended.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.ConfigurationProps.tags
documentation: Property tags: Label configurations, such as the presence of a plurality of tags, separated by commas.

methods.name: ros_cdk_acm.ConfigurationProps.type
documentation: Property type: Provisioning content format, optional values as follows: text, json, xml, yaml, text/html, properties.
